seoTitle: Newman vs Ngaanyatjarra-Giles — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Newman and Ngaanyatjarra-Giles. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Newman and Ngaanyatjarra-Giles.
heading: Newman vs Ngaanyatjarra-Giles — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Newman, Western Australia and Ngaanyatjarra-Giles, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Newman has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Ngaanyatjarra-Giles (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Newman or Ngaanyatjarra-Giles safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Newman has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Ngaanyatjarra-Giles scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Newman scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Ngaanyatjarra-Giles scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Newman or Ngaanyatjarra-Giles?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Newman has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
